name: King Gold and Pawn
description_short: King Gold and Pawn is a New York-based pawn shop specializing in fast cash loans against jewelry, watches, diamonds, and collectibles with low interest rates and no credit checks.
description_long:
King Gold and Pawn operates pawn shop locations across New York, with a primary location in the South Bronx at 1054 Southern Blvd. The company provides collateral-based lending services focused on precious metals and jewelry, offering customers immediate liquidity without traditional credit requirements. The business model centers on accepting valuable items as collateral in exchange for cash loans, allowing borrowers to reclaim their items upon repayment.

The company offers cash loans ranging from $1 to $50,000 against jewelry, watches, diamonds, collectibles, and electronics. They provide free professional appraisals at all locations and advertise low interest rates with flexible repayment policies. The lending process requires no credit checks and minimal paperwork, positioning the service as accessible to borrowers who may not qualify for traditional bank loans. Customers retain ownership of their items during the loan period and can recover them by repaying the loan.

King Gold and Pawn distinguishes itself through multi-location availability (7 locations mentioned across New York), real-time precious metals pricing displayed on their website (gold, silver, platinum rates updated daily), and a stated commitment to competitive pricing on gold purchases. The South Bronx location is NYC DCA licensed (SHD License #1447921, Pawn License #1447924) and maintains accessible hours with convenient public transit access. They emphasize professional, friendly service and friendly paperwork processes.

As a pawn lender, the company serves customers needing immediate cash for short-term financial needs. The trade-off is that borrowers must surrender valuable collateral, and failure to repay within agreed terms results in forfeiture of items. Interest rates and loan terms are not specified on the website, making true cost comparison difficult. The service is most appropriate for borrowers with valuable items who need urgent cash and prefer to avoid traditional credit systems.
pros: No credit checks required—accessible to borrowers with poor or no credit history
Fast cash availability with same-day funding capability on items
Loans from $1 to $50,000 cover a wide range of borrowing needs
Free professional appraisals at all locations
Real-time precious metals pricing (gold, silver, platinum) displayed transparently
Licensed by NYC DCA (SHD and Pawn licenses verified)
7 convenient locations across New York for accessibility
Low interest rates and flexible repayment policy emphasized
cons: Specific interest rates and APR not disclosed on website, making true cost unclear
Risk of losing valuable items if unable to repay loan by deadline
Operating hours limited (closed Sundays; weekday hours 10 AM–6 PM)
Loan terms and grace periods not specified online
Requires physical collateral—not suitable for borrowers without valuable items
best_for: Individuals with poor or no credit history needing immediate cash
Borrowers with valuable jewelry, watches, or collectibles seeking short-term loans
People experiencing temporary financial emergencies who want to avoid debt collection
Collectors or jewelry owners seeking cash while retaining option to reclaim items
diagnosis: King Gold and Pawn is best for borrowers with valuable collateral who need immediate cash without credit checks and prefer not to engage traditional lending or debt collection systems. The primary caveat is that the company does not publicly disclose interest rates or specific loan terms, and borrowers risk losing valuable items if they cannot repay by the deadline—making this appropriate only for those who can afford repayment and truly own spare valuable items.
services: Pawn loans on jewelry (rings, necklaces, bracelets, earrings)
Pawn loans on watches and timepieces
Pawn loans on diamonds and precious gemstones
Pawn loans on collectibles and antiques
Gold and precious metals buying (direct sale)
Item storage and security during loan period
